title: brachiaria obtusa
intro: Brachiaria obtusa, also known as brachiaria grass or tropical button grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachiaria obtusa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, and can also be used as a tea or incorporated into herbal remedies.
